Skills.Name: Long Blades
Skills.Description: Mastery of swords — long, balanced edges that cut deep and bleed long.

Powers.Name: Lacerate
Powers.Description: Long-Blade hits have a substantial chance to apply Bleeding with stronger damage dice. Stacks with the universal Cutting class hook.

Powers.Name: Expertise
Powers.Description: +2 to-hit while wielding a Long-Blade-class weapon (LongSword / Greatsword / ShortSword / Claymore / etc.).

Powers.Name: Lunge
Powers.Description: Active ability: extend the blade in a chosen direction and strike the first creature within 2 cells. Actor doesn't move — the reach is the point. 25-turn cooldown. Requires a Long-Blade weapon equipped.
